series_metadata.series_description: Under Section 6109.07 of the ORC, before anyone can begin construction of or make substantial changes to a public water system they must first get approval of the detailed design plans and material specifications for the improvement from the Director. Si

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in operating area 5 years, store offsite in SRC for 50 yrs., then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper
